title: cytisus supinus var. noeanus
intro: Cytisus supinus var. noeanus, also known as the Nœan broom or Greek broom, is a plant species in the legume family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cytisus supinus var. noeanus include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
